requirement_topic.en: RUT Importer Registration — DIAN Registro Único Tributario
requirement_topic.zh: RUT进口商登记——DIAN统一税务登记
requirement_topic.zht: RUT進口商登記——DIAN統一稅務登記

summary.en: All entities importing goods into Colombia — including wireless devices and IoT equipment — must be registered in the RUT (Registro Único Tributario), Colombia's unified tax registry administered by DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales, the national tax and customs authority). Foreign manufacturers without a Colombian legal presence must engage a Colombian-registered importer or commercial representative who holds a valid RUT and is authorised to clear goods through Colombian customs. The importer-of-record is responsible for customs declarations, payment of import duties and VAT (IVA), and compliance with DIAN import documentation requirements. The CRC homologación certificate must be presented to customs alongside the RUT and import documentation at clearance. Without a valid RUT held by the importer-of-record, goods cannot be cleared through Colombian customs.
summary.zh: 所有向哥伦比亚进口商品的主体——包括无线设备和物联网设备——须在RUT（统一税务登记）中完成登记。RUT是由DIAN（国家税务和海关局，即哥伦比亚国家税务海关机构）管理的统一税务登记系统。没有哥伦比亚法律实体的外国制造商须委托持有有效RUT并获授权进行哥伦比亚海关清关的哥伦比亚注册进口商或商业代理人。记录在案的进口商负责海关申报、缴纳进口关税和增值税（IVA），以及遵守DIAN进口文件要求。CRC型式认证证书须与RUT及进口文件一同在清关时向海关出示。若记录在案的进口商不持有有效RUT，货物将无法通过哥伦比亚海关清关。
summary.zht: 所有向哥倫比亞進口商品的主體——包括無線裝置和物聯網設備——須在RUT（統一稅務登記）中完成登記。RUT是由DIAN（國家稅務和海關局，即哥倫比亞國家稅務海關機構）管理的統一稅務登記系統。沒有哥倫比亞法律實體的外國製造商須委託持有有效RUT並獲授權進行哥倫比亞海關清關的哥倫比亞注冊進口商或商業代理人。記錄在案的進口商負責海關申報、繳納進口關稅和增值稅（IVA），以及遵守DIAN進口文件要求。CRC型式認證證書須與RUT及進口文件一同在清關時向海關出示。若記錄在案的進口商不持有有效RUT，貨物將無法通過哥倫比亞海關清關。

standards_or_laws: RUT — Registro Único Tributario, administered by DIAN (Colombia's national tax and customs authority)
DIAN import procedures — customs declaration, import duties (aranceles), and VAT (IVA) on imported goods
Statute of Customs (Decreto 1165 de 2019) — Colombia customs code governing import documentation and importer-of-record obligations
CRC homologación — certificate required at customs clearance alongside RUT and import documentation

summary.en: In China, importers and exporters must register with the General Administration of Customs (GACC) and hold a customs registration code. Foreign manufacturers exporting to China may need a GACC-registered importer. The Chinese import registration framework is administered by GACC and SAMR, with separate requirements for product certifications (CCC) and food/medical imports. The Chinese customs registration framework is entirely separate from Colombia's RUT system; exporters shipping to Colombia must ensure their Colombian importer or trading partner holds a valid RUT and is authorised to act as importer-of-record for electronics and telecom equipment.
summary.zh: 在中国，进出口商须向海关总署（GACC）登记并持有海关注册编码。向中国出口的外国制造商可能需要一名GACC注册进口商。中国进口登记框架由GACC和国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）管理，产品认证（CCC）及食品/医疗进口另有独立要求。中国海关登记框架与哥伦比亚RUT系统完全独立；向哥伦比亚发货的出口商须确保其哥伦比亚进口商或贸易伙伴持有有效RUT，并获授权作为电子及电信设备的记录在案进口商。
summary.zht: 在中國，進出口商須向海關總署（GACC）登記並持有海關注冊編碼。向中國出口的外國製造商可能需要一名GACC注冊進口商。中國進口登記框架由GACC和國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）管理，產品認證（CCC）及食品/醫療進口另有獨立要求。中國海關登記框架與哥倫比亞RUT系統完全獨立；向哥倫比亞發貨的出口商須確保其哥倫比亞進口商或貿易夥伴持有有效RUT，並獲授權作為電子及電信設備的記錄在案進口商。

standards_or_laws: GACC registration — mandatory customs registration for importers and exporters in China
China customs declaration procedures — export documentation requirements under GACC

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers and exporters do not automatically have a Colombian RUT. To import devices into Colombia, the Chinese manufacturer must either: (a) establish a Colombian legal entity that registers for a RUT, or (b) engage a Colombian-registered importer or distributor who holds a valid RUT and will act as importer-of-record. The importer-of-record must also be named in the CRC homologación application or be the entity that holds the homologation certificate. Planning for the RUT importer relationship should begin before or alongside the CRC homologación application, as both are required for legal import and sale in Colombia.
gap.zh: 中国制造商和出口商不会自动持有哥伦比亚RUT。要向哥伦比亚进口设备，中国制造商须：(a) 在哥伦比亚设立法律实体并登记RUT，或 (b) 委托持有有效RUT并将担任记录在案进口商的哥伦比亚注册进口商或分销商。记录在案的进口商还须在CRC型式认证申请中被列明，或为持有认证证书的主体。RUT进口商关系的规划应在CRC型式认证申请之前或同步进行，因为两者都是在哥伦比亚合法进口和销售的必要条件。
gap.zht: 中國製造商和出口商不會自動持有哥倫比亞RUT。要向哥倫比亞進口裝置，中國製造商須：(a) 在哥倫比亞設立法律實體並登記RUT，或 (b) 委託持有有效RUT並將擔任記錄在案進口商的哥倫比亞注冊進口商或分銷商。記錄在案的進口商還須在CRC型式認證申請中被列明，或為持有認證證書的主體。RUT進口商關係的規劃應在CRC型式認證申請之前或同步進行，因為兩者都是在哥倫比亞合法進口和銷售的必要條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a valid RUT held by the importer-of-record is required for all customs clearance of imported goods in Colombia; no RUT means no clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GACC customs registration required for all importers and exporters in China

source.publisher: DIAN — Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales (Colombia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Colombian RUT held by the importer-of-record is mandatory for customs clearance of all imported devices. Chinese manufacturers without a Colombian legal presence must engage a Colombian-registered importer or distributor. Plan the RUT and importer relationship in parallel with the CRC homologación process. Verify current DIAN import documentation requirements and customs duty rates with a qualified Colombian trade or regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 记录在案进口商持有的哥伦比亚RUT是所有进口设备海关清关的必要条件。没有哥伦比亚法律实体的中国制造商须委托哥伦比亚注册进口商或分销商。应与CRC型式认证流程同步规划RUT和进口商关系。请向合格的哥伦比亚贸易或监管专业人士核验现行DIAN进口文件要求和海关关税税率。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 記錄在案進口商持有的哥倫比亞RUT是所有進口裝置海關清關的必要條件。沒有哥倫比亞法律實體的中國製造商須委託哥倫比亞注冊進口商或分銷商。應與CRC型式認證流程同步規劃RUT和進口商關係。請向合格的哥倫比亞貿易或監管專業人士核驗現行DIAN進口文件要求和海關關稅稅率。
